nasb.text: And the serpent poured water like a river out of his mouth after the woman, so that he might cause her to be swept away with the flood.

esv.text: The serpent poured water like a river out of his mouth after the woman, to sweep her away with a flood.

cnv.text: 蛇在婦人後面，從口中吐出水來，好像江河一樣，要把婦人沖去。

ccb.text: 巨龙紧追不舍，张口吐出大量的水，如同江河一般，要冲走那妇人，

csbs.text: 蛇就在那妇人后面，从口里吐出水来，像江河一样，要把她冲走。
